CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2009 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Entry Of Default, Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Oct-09-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT BOB WARREN'S Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Entry Of Default IS OFF CALENDAR FOR INSUFFICIENT NOTICE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR # 7077 =301/HEK

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Continued To Nov-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Joe Della Santina, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Denise Dianda, who was placed under oath and examined. Mr. Della Santina also appeared for plaintiff Diva Dianda, who was unable to attend today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Bob Warren.
Default was entered against defendant on June 9, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 8, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Diva Dianda, Trustee, Diva M. Dianda 2004 Irrevocable Trust, and Denise Dianda, Trustee, Denise Dianda Revocable Trust UTA May 14, 2004, and against the Defaulted Defendant Bob Warren as follows:

Damages/Principal - $32,416.88, for a total judgment in the amount of $32,416.88.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2009 Continued To Sep-25-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
